dataFlows.transformKql:
source
| extend AROData = todynamic(columnifexists('data',''))
| extend Agent = todynamic(AROData.agent_details)
| extend ID = tostring(columnifexists('serial_id',''))
| extend Severity = tostring(columnifexists('severity',''))
| extend AROType = tostring(columnifexists('type',''))
| extend Title = tostring(columnifexists('title',''))
| extend Hostname = tostring(Agent.hostName)
| extend IPAddress = tostring(Agent.ipAddress)
| extend LastUser = tostring(Agent.lastSessionUser)
| extend DetailsMarkdown = tostring(columnifexists('details_markdown',''))
| extend DetailsRaw = tostring(columnifexists('details',''))
| extend PortalUrl = tostring(columnifexists('display_url',''))
| extend TimeGenerated = now()
| project ID, Severity, AROType, Title, Hostname, IPAddress, LastUser, DetailsMarkdown, DetailsRaw, PortalUrl, TimeGenerated
